PETITION Petition For Order Directing Investment Of Funds (Probate Code 3413)
Off Calendar Jun-24-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard: PES-24-307438 Estate of Reisel Berger and PES-25-308321 Sanina Narayan.

Appearances: Kale Heiman appeared via zoom for Neetan Narayan (petitioner).

Council stated that her client would like to proceed with the 3411 petition to put the funds into a blocked account until the minor turns 18.

Both petitions are taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Thompson. Not reported
